pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup scripts that download and process the bfi dataset into this path.
Confirmed via verifier.py which checks this exact path for the saved Jamovi project.
Confirmed via verifier.py which checks this exact path for the text file containing the results.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires performing a hierarchical linear regression on the real bfi dataset to predict a computed Conscientiousness score (mean of C1-C5). Independent verification using R and python confirms that the expected R² change when adding Age_Sq to the model is approximately 0.000378, with an F-test p-value of approximately 0.3376.
